testFiles.purpose: Unit tests for the pure validation utility that checks BufferGeometry attributes for existence, correct item sizes, and finite values

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes returns ok:true for geometry with all required attributes at correct item sizes and finite values
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry with position(3), color(3), size(1), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3) — all filled with valid finite Float32Array values

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes detects missing attribute and returns descriptive error
acceptance_criteria: All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry with position(3) only, expected schema requires position(3) and size(1)
assertions: error reason includes 'missing' or similar descriptor

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes detects wrong itemSize for position attribute
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry with position attribute set to itemSize=2 instead of expected 3
assertions: error reason mentions expected itemSize 3 vs actual 2

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes detects NaN values in position buffer
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create valid BufferGeometry, inject NaN at positionsArr[3] (second point x-coordinate)
assertions: error reason mentions NaN or non-finite

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes detects Infinity values in size buffer
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create valid BufferGeometry with size attribute, inject Infinity at sizesArr[0]
assertions: error reason mentions Infinity or non-finite

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes detects negative Infinity in aRandom buffer
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create valid BufferGeometry with aRandom(3) attribute, inject -Infinity at index 0

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes passes for empty geometry (0-length Float32Arrays)
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry with all required attributes using new Float32Array(0) — zero points is a valid edge case

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes passes for single-point geometry with valid values
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry with 1 point: position=[1,2,3], color=[0.5,0.5,0.5], size=[0.04], aHueOffset=[10], aRandom=[0.1,0.2,0.3]

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes reports multiple errors when multiple attributes are invalid
acceptance_criteria: All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry missing 'color' and with NaN in 'size' buffer
assertions: errors include one for 'color' (missing) and one for 'size' (non-finite)

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes with no expected attributes passes any geometry
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
tests.setup: Create empty BufferGeometry and call validateGeometryAttributes with empty expectedAttrs array

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes detects wrong itemSize on custom attribute (aRandom expects 3, given 1)
acceptance_criteria: All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry with aRandom set to itemSize=1 instead of expected 3
assertions: result.errors has entry with attribute:'aRandom' mentioning itemSize mismatch

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes accepts negative finite values (valid for positions)
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry with position values like [-5.0, -3.2, -1.0] — all negative but finite

tests.description: validateGeometryAttributes accepts zero values in all buffers (valid edge case)
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create BufferGeometry where all Float32Array values are 0.0

testFiles.purpose: Integration tests verifying that pointCloud.init() validates geometry attributes and rejects invalid state

tests.description: pointCloud init() succeeds with valid seed and params (geometry passes validation)
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: createPointCloud() with default config, init with valid seed and defaultParams

tests.description: pointCloud geometry has all required attributes after init: position(3), color(3), size(1), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3)
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: createPointCloud(), init with valid params, get geometry from Points mesh

tests.description: pointCloud position buffer contains only finite values after init (no NaN or Infinity)
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: createPointCloud(), init with valid params, read position attribute array
assertions: Every value in position Float32Array passes Number.isFinite()

tests.description: pointCloud all buffer attributes contain only finite values after init
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: createPointCloud(), init with valid params, read all attribute arrays
assertions: Every value in color array passes Number.isFinite()
Every value in size array passes Number.isFinite()
Every value in aHueOffset array passes Number.isFinite()
Every value in aRandom array passes Number.isFinite()

tests.description: pointCloud position buffer values are finite at boundary params (density=0, density=1, structureComplexity=1)
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create pointCloud for each boundary param combo, verify position arrays after init
assertions: All position values finite for density=0
All position values finite for density=1, structureComplexity=1

testFiles.purpose: Integration tests verifying that particleField.init() validates geometry attributes and rejects invalid state

tests.description: particleField init() succeeds with valid seed and params (geometry passes validation)
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: createParticleField() with default config, init with valid seed and defaultParams

tests.description: particleField geometry has all required attributes after init: position(3), size(1), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3) — no color attribute
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
All required custom attributes exist before material assignment
tests.setup: createParticleField(), init with valid params, get geometry from Points mesh
assertions: geometry.getAttribute('color') is falsy (particleField does not set color attribute)

tests.description: particleField position buffer contains only finite values after init
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: createParticleField(), init with valid params, read position attribute array
assertions: Every value in position Float32Array passes Number.isFinite()

tests.description: particleField all buffer attributes contain only finite values after init
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: createParticleField(), init with valid params, read all attribute arrays
assertions: Every value in size array passes Number.isFinite()
Every value in aHueOffset array passes Number.isFinite()
Every value in aRandom array passes Number.isFinite()

tests.description: particleField position buffer values are finite at boundary params (density=0, density=1)
acceptance_criteria: Geometry initialization rejects NaN or non-finite values in critical buffers
tests.setup: Create particleField for density=0 and density=1 boundary cases, verify position arrays after init
assertions: All position values finite for density=0
All position values finite for density=1

testFiles.purpose: Tests verifying that the render loop gates on valid geometry state and does not call draw() when geometry init fails

tests.description: render loop does not call geometrySystem.draw() when geometrySystem.init() throws
acceptance_criteria: Renderer does not enter the main loop with invalid geometry state
tests.setup: Create a mock geometrySystem where init() throws Error('invalid geometry'). Provide seed and signals so init path is triggered. Run 3 frames via mocked requestAnimationFrame.
assertions: renderer.render was still called (loop continues for camera/placeholder)

tests.description: render loop calls geometrySystem.draw() normally when init() succeeds
acceptance_criteria: Renderer does not enter the main loop with invalid geometry state
tests.setup: Create a mock geometrySystem where init() succeeds (no throw). Provide seed and signals. Run 3 frames.
assertions: geometrySystem.draw was called on subsequent frames

tests.description: render loop does not call draw() when initAllForValidation path throws
acceptance_criteria: Renderer does not enter the main loop with invalid geometry state
tests.setup: Create a mock geometrySystem with initAllForValidation method that throws. Provide errorCollector and renderer with compile method. Run 3 frames.
assertions: renderer.render was still called (loop does not crash)

tests.description: render loop logs error to console when geometry init fails
acceptance_criteria: Renderer does not enter the main loop with invalid geometry state
tests.setup: Create mock geometrySystem with init() that throws. Spy on console.error. Run frames.
assertions: console.error was called with a message containing the init error

tests.description: render loop still removes placeholder mesh even when geometry init fails
acceptance_criteria: Renderer does not enter the main loop with invalid geometry state
tests.setup: Create mock geometrySystem with init() that throws. Provide placeholderMesh. Run frames.
assertions: placeholderMesh is not removed from scene (stays as fallback since geometry failed)
OR placeholderMesh is removed depending on implementation — key point is no crash

tests.description: render loop continues camera updates and rendering even with invalid geometry
acceptance_criteria: Renderer does not enter the main loop with invalid geometry state
tests.setup: Create mock geometrySystem with init() that throws. Provide seed for camera init. Run 3 frames.

testFiles.purpose: Tests verifying the AttributeSpec type is properly exported and usable

tests.description: AttributeSpec type can describe geometry attribute expectations with name and itemSize
acceptance_criteria: Position attribute exists and matches expected item size
tests.setup: Import AttributeSpec from types.ts, create an array of AttributeSpec objects matching pointCloud schema
assertions: Array of AttributeSpec objects compiles and has correct shape
Each entry has string name and number itemSize

defaultParams.location: Each test file defines its own defaultParams (existing pattern)
defaultParams.shape: VisualParams with paletteHue:180, paletteSaturation:0.5, cadence:0.7, density:0.6, motionAmplitude:1.0, etc.

validGeometryFactory.purpose: Helper to create a valid BufferGeometry with all standard attributes for validator unit tests

systemSpecificNotes.particleField: Does NOT have a 'color' buffer attribute — colors are computed GPU-side. Its REQUIRED_ATTRIBUTES should be position(3), size(1), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3). Test T-050-20 explicitly verifies color is absent.
systemSpecificNotes.renderLoop: Has two init paths: direct init() and initAllForValidation+validateShaderCompilation. Both paths must be wrapped in try/catch with geometryValid flag. Tests T-050-29 and T-050-31 cover both branches.
